name: add_or_replace_documents
description: Add new documents to a Meilisearch index or replace existing ones that share the same primary key. Accepts a JSON array of document objects. The operation is asynchronous and returns a task ID you can use to track progress. Supports up to millions of documents per batch.

parameters.name: indexUid
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the index to add documents to.

parameters.name: primaryKey
parameters.description: The attribute to use as the unique document identifier. Only needed on first addition if not auto-detected.

parameters.name: documents
parameters.description: Array of document objects to add or replace. Each object should have a primary key field.
